---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-17"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

```{r}


library(tidyverse)
library(here)


country_avg_poll <- read.csv(here("output", "country_avg_headstate.csv"))


aux <- read.csv("https://mrp-psf.ams3.digitaloceanspaces.com/other-files/const_data_full_new.csv")
aux <- aux %>% mutate(const_name = gsub("Ynys Mon", "Ynys Môn", const_name))

# Create country variable in aux
aux <- aux %>%
  mutate(
    region_2 = case_when(
      region_name %in% c(
        "East Midlands", "East of England", "Greater London",
        "North East England", "North West England", "South East England",
        "South West England", "West Midlands", "Yorkshire and the Humber",
        "London", "England"
      ) ~ "England",
      region_name == "Scotland" ~ "Scotland",
      region_name == "Wales"    ~ "Wales",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

# Load constituency-level MRP predictions
preds_headstate <- read.csv(here("output", "headstate_constituency.csv"))

# Join region_2 from aux
preds_headstate <- preds_headstate %>%
  dplyr::left_join(aux %>% dplyr::select(const_name, region_2),
                   by = "const_name") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    region_2 = dplyr::case_when(
      const_name == "Ynys MÃ´n" ~ "Wales",
      TRUE                     ~ region_2
    )
  )

# Rename net_score to make clear it is MRP net score 
preds_headstate <- preds_headstate %>%
  dplyr::rename(mrp_preds = mean_percent)

# Prepare country-level poll averages, keeping the name country_avg_poll
country_avg_poll <- country_avg_poll %>%
  dplyr::rename(country_avg_poll = avg_head_of_state)

# Join country-level poll averages onto predictions by country/region_2
preds_headstate <- preds_headstate %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    country_avg_poll %>% dplyr::select(country, country_avg_poll),
    by = c("region_2" = "country")
  )

## compute MRP average per country
preds_headstate <- preds_headstate %>%
  dplyr::group_by(region_2) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(mrp_average_headstate = mean(mrp_preds)) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

## compute multiplier and reweighted net score

preds_headstate <- preds_headstate %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    mult = country_avg_poll / mrp_average_headstate,          
    headstate_score_reweighted = mrp_preds * mult            
  )



preds_headstate_reweighted <- preds_headstate %>% select(const_name, headstate_score_reweighted )






write.csv(preds_headstate_reweighted, here("output", "preds_headstate_reweighted.csv"), row.names = FALSE)


write.csv(preds_headstate, here("output", "preds_headstate.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
